prompt: Implement mm1_metrics(arrival_rate, service_rate). For a stable M/M/1 queue return utilization, average jobs in system, average jobs waiting, average system time, and average waiting time. Rates use the same time unit. Require arrival_rate >= 0, service_rate > 0, and arrival_rate < service_rate.
instruction: Implement mm1_metrics(arrival_rate, service_rate). For a stable M/M/1 queue return utilization, average jobs in system, average jobs waiting, average system time, and average waiting time. Rates use the same time unit. Require arrival_rate >= 0, service_rate > 0, and arrival_rate < service_rate.
